title: Charred Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful North African-inspired dish featuring charred chicken cooked in a rich tagine sauce with semolina and algerian spices.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Char the chicken in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
In the same skillet, add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the semolina and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Shred the chicken and add to the skillet. Stir to combine with the tagine sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with parsley and serve over couscous or rice.
